remember: Students will be able to recall the definition and types of biotechnology.
Students will be able to explain the various applications of biotechnology.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of recombinant DNA technology.
Students will be able to explain the use of genetically engineered microorganisms in agriculture and industry.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of biotechnology to solve problems related to health and environment.
Students will be able to design experiments to study the applications of biotechnology.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of biotechnology.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of biotechnology on human society and the environment.

ncert_objectives: Explain the definition and types of biotechnology.
Describe the various applications of biotechnology.
Explain the concept of recombinant DNA technology and its applications.
Explain the use of genetically engineered microorganisms in agriculture and industry.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the importance of biotechnology in agriculture, industry, and medicine.
Describe the applications of genetically modified organisms in agriculture and industry.
Explain the concept of gene therapy and its applications in medicine.
Discuss the ethical issues related to biotechnology and its applications.
